tool.name: OGS: computeSurfaceNodeIDsInPolygonalRegion
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'computeSurfaceNodeIDsInPolygonalRegion'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $mesh_input_file: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for #for $m in $geo_file: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for #for $m in $gmsh_path: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for computeSurfaceNodeIDsInPolygonalRegion #for $m in $mesh_input_file: --mesh-input-file "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for #for $m in $geo_file: --geo-file "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for #for $m in $gmsh_path: --gmsh-path "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for

param.name: mesh_input_file
param.label: mesh input file
param.help: Input (.vtu). the file containing the input mesh

param.name: geo_file
param.label: geo file
param.help: Input (.gml). the input file containing the polygons

param.name: gmsh_path
param.label: gmsh path
param.help: Input (.msh). The path to the input binary file

tool.help: This tool runs the **computeSurfaceNodeIDsInPolygonalRegion** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
